name: Hum Kahan Ke Sachay Thay
overview: Story of orphan girl Mehreen and her cousin Mashaal. How the Series of childhood abuse from their elders and unnecessary comparisons between them brought up the haeat and hattered between them, ultimately ended up on different level. The buffered love story.
